dateline: Hawthorne, CA / Boca Chica, TX — May 2002–Present
heroHeadline: Starlink 17-16 Scrubs to April 26 — Motley Fool: SpaceX IPO 'Could Make Millionaires'
heroSubtitle: 8,756 days of reusability milestones — Starlink 17-16 (B1088 15th flight, 25 sats, OCISLY) scrubbed Apr 25 to Apr 26 at Vandenberg; Motley Fool Apr 25: $75B raise, $1.75–2T valuation, 1/3 retail allocation ahead of June 2026 Nasdaq IPO; Bloomberg Apr 24 moat analysis; Cursor AI $60B option (Apr 23); Golden Dome consortium (Apr 22); 50 orbital launches in 2026; 600th booster landing Apr 19; Starship IFT-12 targeting May 2026
footerNote: Data sourced from SpaceX.com, FAA, NASA, SpaceNews, NASASpaceflight.com, Spaceflight Now, Teslarati, TeslaOracle, CNBC, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, TIME, Space.com, Inside GNSS, Northrop Grumman, Yahoo Finance, Motley Fool, Quilty Space, RocketLaunch.org
